task_completion.description: Create the intel_mapper directory in the Talon user folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer, terminal, or IDE showing the directory C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\intel_mapper has been created.

task_completion.description: Create entity_types.talon-list with the required entity types
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing 'entity_types.talon-list' containing 'list: user.entity_type' and the items: person, organization, location, vehicle, telephone, weapon.

task_completion.description: Create relationship_types.talon-list with the required relationship types
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing 'relationship_types.talon-list' containing 'list: user.relationship_type' and the items: member_of, leader_of, located_at, owns, communicated_with, used.

task_completion.description: Implement intel_mapper.py with state management, required actions, and CSV export logic
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'intel_mapper.py' with Python code defining a Talon Module, actions (set_entity_subject, set_entity_target, link_entities, export_graph, clear_graph), and the export_graph function writing to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\nodes.csv and edges.csv.

task_completion.description: Create intel_mapper.talon mapping voice phrases to actions
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'intel_mapper.talon' with voice commands 'entity subject', 'entity target', 'entity link', 'entity export', and 'entity clear' mapped to their respective user actions.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actively created and edited the files
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using a text editor (like VS Code, Notepad) or terminal commands (like echo, New-Item) to write the code, rather than just copying pre-existing files.

integrity.description: Verify the files are saved in the correct Talon user directory
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths visible in the IDE tabs, terminal prompts, or file explorer must match C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\intel_mapper\.

integrity.description: Verify the files contain actual code and not just placeholders
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of the .py, .talon, and .talon-list files should show valid syntax and logic as requested, not just empty files or comments.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target directory for the Talon module is C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\intel_mapper. The module must consist of exactly 4 files: entity_types.talon-list, relationship_types.talon-list, intel_mapper.py, and intel_mapper.talon. The Python script must reference C:\Users\Docker\Documents\nodes.csv and C:\Users\Docker\Documents\edges.csv for the export_graph action.
